## Gate checks
| Check | Result | Detail |
|---|---|---|

## Findings
- [ ] **[BLOCK][Coverage] Overall coverage dipped 85.9% → 85.7% vs v0.4.4**
  - **Status quo:** Total statement coverage dropped 0.2 points since the last release, driven by the new `updatecheck/updateapply` package (83.9%) sitting slightly below the prior repo average. Full breakdown in `.github/coverage/2026-07-10T00-00-00Z.md`.
  - **Likely cause:** `download`/`downloadToTemp` error-path branches (82.4–84.6%) plus `Reexec` (0.0%, calls `syscall.Exec` and cannot run in-process under `go test`).
  - **Proposed solution:** Add a couple of guard-clause/error-path tests for `download`/`downloadToTemp` to close the gap, or accept as a marginal, well-understood dip (still 5.7pp above the 80% default bar) tied to one hard-to-cover process-replacement function.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` report already generated at `.github/coverage/2026-07-10T00-00-00Z.md` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage .github/coverage/2026-07-10T00-00-00Z.md` → `/03-gh-go`
